channel.title: Pdf on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pdf on Margrop Blog

item.title: Recommendations and downloads of commonly used Windows software, no recommendations
item.description: Here we recommend some software commonly used in the Windows environment of this site. There are no recommendations. If you don’t like it, please close the page. This software is equivalent to Windows version 应用市场, but does not include any bundled software. *Tencent officially closed the download of this independent version of the software N years ago (N>3). For the application market, it is obviously not cost-effective to install an additional Tencent Computer Manager.
